metadata.description: Language-agnostic workflow plugins for Claude Code — cross-model AI collaboration, rebase automation, changelog generation, and TDD workflows

plugins.name: loom
plugins.description: Weave prompts across Claude, Gemini, and GPT in parallel — brainstorm, refine, plan, execute, architect, review, and synthesize the best of all models

plugins.name: rebase
plugins.description: Automated rebase onto trunk with conflict prediction, resolution, and quality gate verification

plugins.name: changelog
plugins.description: Generate categorized changelog entries from branch commits and PR context

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: TDD bug-fix workflow — reproduce bugs as failing tests, find root cause, fix, and verify

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Create git commits following project conventions with format enforcement and safety checks

plugins.name: model-cli
plugins.description: Run prompts through individual AI CLIs — codex/GPT, gemini, and cursor/agent with fallback support

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: Generate and review gold-standard PR descriptions and merge commit messages with structured headings, tables, and test plans

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Clone and study your project's dependencies at the exact versions you use — source repos with version-pinned git worktrees

plugins.name: tailwind
plugins.description: Detect and fix inconsistent spacing in Tailwind CSS layouts — container fragmentation, margin/gap mixing, padding asymmetry, and more
